articles.author: Tucker  Reals
articles.title: Live Updates: Israel kills 2 senior Iran leaders as allies reject Trump's call for Strait of Hormuz help - CBS News
articles.description: Israel says it killed Iran's top security official Ali Larijani, as America's European allies reject Trump's demands for help in the Strait of Hormuz.
articles.content: The Israel Defense Forces said in a statement Tuesday that the commander of Iran's feared Basij paramilitary force was among the senior leaders killed in overnight strikes in Tehran, and the Israeli … [+1901 chars]
